title: Updating Adobe Creative Cloud Applications to the Latest Version
body: Launch the Adobe Creative Cloud application On Windows: Open the Start Menu and search for "Adobe Creative Cloud" . Select the app. On MacOS: Under "Applications" , open the "Adobe Creative Cloud" folder and select the "Adobe Creative Cloud" application inside Navigate to the "Apps" tab in the Adobe Creative Cloud Application, then select the "Updates" section in the left column. Find the application that you would like to update and click the blue "Update" button next to the application. If the application has a white "Open" button instead, the application is already up to date. If your update starts automatically, your application is already on the latest major version (version 2019 at the time of writing) and will receive minor updates. Otherwise, a window will appear, asking to confirm you're updating the specified application. You will be presented with a few options. By selecting the "Remove old versions" checkbox, the update will uninstall all previous versions of this application and replace it with the newest version. When your preferred options are selected, click the blue "Continue" button. The Adobe Creative Cloud application will begin installing the new version of your selected application. A progress bar will appear below the application. When the progress bar disappears, your application is up to date! Launch the Adobe Creative Cloud application On Windows: Open the Start Menu and search for "Adobe Creative Cloud" . Select the app. On MacOS: Under "Applications ", open the "Adobe Creative Cloud" folder and select the "Adobe Creative Cloud " application inside Navigate to the "Apps " tab in the Adobe Creative Cloud Application, then select the "Updates" section in the left column. Select the " Update All " text at the top-right of the window. If this text is grayed out and cannot be clicked, all your applications are already up to date. If your update starts automatically, your applications are already on the latest major version (version 2019 at the time of writing) and will receive minor updates. Otherwise, a window will appear, asking to confirm you're updating all of your applications. You will be presented with a few options. By selecting the "Remove old versions" checkbox, the update will uninstall all previous versions of these applications and replace it with the newest versions. When your preferred options are selected, click the blue "Continue" button. The Adobe Creative Cloud application will begin installing the new versions of your applications. A progress bar or the text "Waiting..." will appear next to each application. When the progress bars disappear, your applications are up to date!
